name: Cornish Hens W/Rum
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the hens in half lengthwise.
2. Wash the hens and pat dry.
3. Mix together the rum, lime juice, honey, garlic, and salt to create a marinade.
4. Rub the mixture all over the hens and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
5. Coarsely crush the coriander seeds and peppercorns using a mortar and pestle.
6. Remove the hens from the marinade, reserving it for basting.
7. Press the crushed coriander seeds and peppercorns into the skin side of the hens.
8. Grill over hot coals for 20 - 25 minutes, turning frequently and basting with the reserved marinade.
